scenes.narration: Bhai, Google ke SDE-2 round mein Virtual Memory & Page Faults pe ye trick poochhi jati hai. 30 second sun le.
Without understanding Virtual Memory & Page Faults, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Virtual Memory & Page Faults like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Virtual Memory & Page Faults: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Virtual Memory & Page Faults: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Virtual Memory & Page Faults to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Virtual Memory & Page Faults solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
